Publication portal

Searchable publications with AI-readable summaries

This module keeps the publication discovery flow separated from the rest of the site, making it easier to evolve into a real content service later.

AI assistant preview

Generated communication assets

Selected paper

Leveraging LLMs to Streamline the Review of Public Funding Applications

Accessible summary

This paper shows how AI can help public agencies review large volumes of applications faster while keeping human oversight in the loop.

Industry angle

Useful for organizations that process high-volume applications, reimbursements or compliance-heavy forms.

Social snippet

MLKD research explores how LLMs can reduce public-sector review bottlenecks while preserving careful evaluation.
